description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.14 Docker image. Define a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/gitlab-org/prometheus-storage-migrator and two stages: test and build. Add a before_script that creates the directory ${GOPATH}/src/${REPO_NAME} and moves the project files into it. In the test stage add a test job that runs go test -v "${REPO_NAME}/...". In the build stage add a build job that runs go build "${REPO_NAME}". No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
